name: adhd-an-a-z
description: Leanne Maskell's 'ADHD an A-Z: Figuring it Out Step by Step' — a practical, accessible guide to navigating adult ADHD, from diagnosis and medication to executive function, rejection sensitivity, burnout, and building a life that works with your brain.
useCase: Understand adult ADHD, navigate diagnosis and treatment, manage executive dysfunction, regulate emotions, and build practical strategies for thriving at work and in life.
knownRisks: UK-focused — healthcare and diagnosis pathways differ by country
General advice — not a substitute for professional medical guidance
Individual experiences with ADHD vary widely — strategies that work for one person may not work for another
